description: Documents Google Workspace branding configuration including custom logos, login page customization, and brand colors. Actual branding changes must be applied via the Admin Console — this module tracks the intended configuration as Terraform-managed OU metadata.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk profile variation — branding is identical across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk profile variation — branding is identical across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk profile variation — branding is identical across profiles.

primary_color.label: Primary Brand Color
primary_color.client_description: Your primary brand color in hex format (e.g., '#1a1a2e'). Used for login page and email template theming.

secondary_color.label: Secondary Brand Color
secondary_color.client_description: Your secondary/accent color in hex format. Used for links and interactive elements.

logo_url.label: Logo URL
logo_url.client_description: URL to your organization's logo image. This must be uploaded manually via the Admin Console — the URL is tracked here for documentation.

custom_login_page_enabled.label: Custom Login Page
custom_login_page_enabled.client_description: Whether to enable custom login page branding with your organization's colors and logo.

outputs.branding_policy_ou_path: OU path documenting the branding configuration
